executives.name: David E. Constable
executives.background: Mr. Constable has served as Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Fluor since January 2021. He previously served as Chief Executive Officer of Sasol Ltd from 2011 to 2016. He was also a director of ABB Ltd and Rio Tinto.

executives.name: Joseph L. Brennan
executives.background: Mr. Brennan has served as Chief Financial Officer since July 2020. He previously served as Senior Vice President, Controller and Chief Accounting Officer.

executives.name: John R. Reynolds
executives.background: Mr. Reynolds has served as Chief Legal Officer and Secretary since January 2021. He joined Fluor in 1985 and has held various legal positions.

executives.name: Stacy L. MacDiarmid
executives.background: Ms. MacDiarmid has served as Chief Human Resources Officer since January 2021. She has been with Fluor since 1998.

board_of_directors.name: David E. Constable
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of Fluor Corporation. Former CEO of Sasol Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Alan M. Bennett
board_of_directors.background: Former President and CEO of H&R Block, Inc. Former CFO of Aetna Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Rosemary T. Berkery
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman of UBS Bank USA and Vice Chairman of UBS Wealth Management Americas.

board_of_directors.name: H. Paulett Eberhart
board_of_directors.background: CEO of HMS Ventures. Former President and CEO of Invensys Process Systems.

board_of_directors.name: James T. Hackett
board_of_directors.background: President of Tessellation Services, LLC. Former Executive Chairman of Anadarko Petroleum Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Gerard J. Arpey
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of AMR Corporation and American Airlines, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Thomas C. Leppert
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of The Turner Corporation. Former Mayor of Dallas.

board_of_directors.name: Teri P. McClure
board_of_directors.background: Former Chief Human Resources Officer and Senior Vice President of Labor of United Parcel Service, Inc.
